About Me
Hi! I'm Christy A, a pre-final year Electronics & Communication Engineering student at Idhaya Engineering College for Women. I'm passionate about data, design, and digital tools. I offer freelance services to help individuals and businesses manage data, design interfaces, and work more efficiently.
